name: Basic Chicken Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. In a nonreactive mixing bowl, combine the orange juice, lemon juice, Dijon mustard, and worcestershire sauce.
2. Whisk in the canola oil gradually until well blended.
3. Add the garlic, chopped parsley, dried oregano, salt, and freshly ground black peppercorns to the mixture.
4. The marinade will make about 1-1/2 cups.
